pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may cause compatibility issues or prevent access to new features, and the recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping it at 11 would result in a mismatch with the target environment and potentially older bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-mysql dependency to support MySQL migrations in Flyway.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway requires a specific database driver dependency to function; without this, Flyway may fail to connect to MySQL at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the old MySQL connector artifact with the new com.mysql:mysql-connector-j artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old mysql:mysql-connector-java artifact is deprecated and removed in newer versions; using it will cause dependency resolution failures or runtime errors with modern MySQL drivers.
